_comment: Copy to config.json and edit paths to match your SOFABoot project. Or run `sofarpc facade detect-config --write` for auto-detection.

facadeModules._comment: Multiple entries supported if your project has several facade modules.
facadeModules.name: myproject-facade

_sofarpcBin: 'sofarpc' if on PATH, else absolute path to the binary
_interfaceSuffixes: Class name suffixes considered as RPC entry points. Most SOFA projects use Facade or Api.
_requiredMarkers: Substrings in Javadoc that mark a field/param as required. '|必传|' convention in SOFA Javadoc is detected automatically.
_defaultContext: Name of the sofarpc context to use when none is specified. Must exist in ~/.sofarpc/contexts.json. Leave blank until the project's real default is known.
_manifestPath: Path to sofarpc.manifest.json relative to project root.
